questions.question: Paul uses the example of a potter and clay to illustrate what?
options: God's sovereign right over his creation
questions.answer: God's sovereign right over his creation

questions.question: Which two brothers does Paul reference to show God's sovereign choice?
Paul says he would be willing to be cut off from Christ for the sake of his fellow Israelites.
I will have _____ on whom I have mercy, and I will have compassion on whom I have compassion.
It is not of him who wills, nor of him who runs, but of God who has _____.
